---
title: "Trading Analysis Blog"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, author]
    feed: true
    page-size: 9
    image-height: 200px
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --card-hover-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  }

  /* --- 1. カスタムヘッダーデザイン（Quarto公式ブログスタイル） --- */
  .quarto-title-block.default {
    display: none; /* デフォルトのタイトルを隠す */
  }

  .hero-section {
    background: #f8f9fb;
    color: #111;
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    text-align: left;
    max-width: 800px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    color: #525453;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #636466;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  /* --- 2. お知らせバー --- */
  .system-alert {
    background: #f8fafc;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    color: #475569;
    padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    margin: 0 auto 2rem;
    max-width: 800px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
  }

  .alert-icon {
    background: #64748b;
    color: white;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* --- 3. 記事カード（Listing）の調整 --- */
  .quarto-grid-item {
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 6px;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background: white;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .quarto-grid-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: var(--card-hover-shadow);
    border-color: #cbd5e1;
  }

  .card-body {
    padding: 1.5rem;
  }

  /* カテゴリバッジのデザイン */
  .listing-categories .listing-category {
    background: #f1f5f9;
    color: #475569;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 500;
    border: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  
  .listing-categories .listing-category:hover {
    background: #334155;
    color: white;
  }

  /* 日付のスタイル */
  .listing-date {
    color: #64748b;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0;
  }

  .listing-title {
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.4;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    color: #111;
  }
</style>

<div class="hero-section">
  <h1 class="hero-title">Trading Analysis Blog</h1>
  <div class="hero-subtitle">Market Insights, Performance Review & Strategy Notes</div>
</div>

<div class="system-alert">
  <div class="alert-icon"><i class="bi bi-cone-striped"></i></div>
  <div>
    <strong>System Notice:</strong> 
    現在バックエンド改修・テスト中のため、同一タイトルの投稿が複数表示される場合があります。最新の日付を参照してください。
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {#posts}
:::
